title: Octo Chaos — Stale Scenario State
description: Identifies chaos-audit events where a scenario remains active past its TTL. Used by the chaos-cleanup playbook (tier: low) to auto-clear the registry.
query: 'Log Source' = 'octo-chaos-audit' and Event = 'chaos.apply' | stats latest(ts) as applied_at, latest(Chaos Scenario) as scenario, latest('Chaos TTL Seconds') as ttl by 'Chaos Target' | eval expires_at = applied_at + ttl | eval now = toepoch(current_timestamp) | where expires_at < now
notes: Auto-remediation safe: chaos clear is a tier-low action.
